page_metadata.biotools__summary: PhageTB is a multilevel prediction method for predicting interactions between bacteriophages and pathogenic bacterial hosts. This study develops a novel host prediction method for predicting hosts of query phages by their genome sequences utilizing alignment-based and alignment-free features.
